ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used (e.g., reinforcement learning, supervised learning) */,
  "technique" TEXT /* Technique used (e.g., deep learning, transfer learning) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the model */,
  "dataset_used" TEXT /* The dataset used for training the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "code_repository" TEXT /* Link to the code repository for the version */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Git commit hash for version control */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the metric belongs to */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean squared error (MSE) of the model */,
  "rewards_mean" REAL /* Mean rewards obtained by the model */,
  "rewards_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of rewards obtained by the model */,
  "returns_mean" REAL /* Mean returns obtained by the model */,
  "returns_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of returns obtained by the model */,
  "actions_mean" REAL /* Mean actions taken by the model */,
  "actions_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of actions taken by the model */,
  "episodes_mean" REAL /* Mean episodes played by the model */,
  "episodes_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of episodes played by the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "test_dataset" TEXT /* The dataset used for testing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exploration_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exploration metric */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the metric belongs to */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean squared error (MSE) of the model during exploration */,
  "rewards_mean" REAL /* Mean rewards obtained by the model during exploration */,
  "rewards_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of rewards obtained by the model during exploration */,
  "returns_mean" REAL /* Mean returns obtained by the model during exploration */,
  "returns_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of returns obtained by the model during exploration */,
  "actions_mean" REAL /* Mean actions taken by the model during exploration */,
  "actions_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of actions taken by the model during exploration */,
  "episodes_mean" REAL /* Mean episodes played by the model during exploration */,
  "episodes_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of episodes played by the model during exploration */,
  "exploration_rate" REAL /* Rate of exploration */,
  "exploration_strategy" TEXT /* Strategy used for exploration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exploration_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainings" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the training belongs to */,
  "train_time" REAL /* Time taken to train the model */,
  "eval_time" REAL /* Time taken to evaluate the model */,
  "sample_time" REAL /* Time taken to sample data */,
  "epoch_time" REAL /* Time taken per epoch */,
  "total_train_time" REAL /* Total time taken to train the model */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used during training */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used during training */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used during training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainings_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
